ucs.title: [LLM] Cyber Av3ngers Unitronics Vision/Samba PLC targeting via PCOM TCP/20256
ucs.description: Hunts TCP/20256 (Unitronics PCOM) traffic to/from the corporate IT estate — Cyber Av3ngers (IRGC-CEC) has consistently used this protocol/port to reach internet-exposed Unitronics Vision-series PLCs (e.g. Aliquippa, PA water authority, Nov-2023) and to fingerprint/deface devices with default password '1111'. Outbound 20256 from a Windows endpoint is overwhelmingly anomalous and a high-fidelity pivot signal that an IT host is being used as a foothold against OT.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count, values(All_Traffic.action) as action, values(All_Traffic.app) as app, min(_time) as firstSeen, max(_time) as lastSeen, dc(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dst_count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_port=20256 All_Traffic.transport=tcp by All_Traffic.src_ip All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.dest_ip All_Traffic.dest 
| `drop_dm_object_name("All_Traffic")` 
| eval src_zone=case(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8",src_ip) OR cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12",src_ip) OR cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16",src_ip),"internal",1=1,"external") 
| eval dst_zone=case(cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8",dest_ip) OR cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12",dest_ip) OR cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16",dest_ip),"internal",1=1,"external") 
| search NOT [ inputlookup ot_engineering_workstations.csv | fields src_ip ] 
| eval scenario=case(src_zone=="internal" AND dst_zone=="external","endpoint_pivot_to_internet_PLC", src_zone=="external" AND dst_zone=="internal","inbound_PLC_targeting", src_zone=="internal" AND dst_zone=="internal" AND dst_count>5,"internal_PLC_sweep") 
| where isnotnull(scenario) 
| sort - count
ucs.kql:
// Cyber Av3ngers — Unitronics PCOM (TCP/20256) traffic from the IT estate
let _ot_jumphost_devices = dynamic(["OT-JUMP01","OT-ENG01"]);   // allowlist legitimate Unitronics VisiLogic / engineering hosts
let _suspicious_tools = dynamic(["python.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell.exe","nmap.exe","masscan.exe","curl.exe","nc.exe","ncat.exe"]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where Protocol =~ "Tcp"
| where RemotePort == 20256                                          // Unitronics PCOM
| where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","ConnectionAttempt")
| where DeviceName !in~ (_ot_jumphost_devices)
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| extend SuspiciousTool = iff(InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_suspicious_tools), "yes", "no")
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            DistinctPLCs = dcount(RemoteIP),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            SamplePLCs = make_set(RemoteIP, 25),
            SampleCmd  = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine)
          by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteIPType, SuspiciousTool
| where DistinctPLCs >= 1                                            // any 20256 contact is anomalous; >=3 = sweep
| order by DistinctPLCs desc, ConnCount desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Cyber Av3ngers — Unitronics PCOM (TCP/20256) traffic — Sentinel via ASIM + perimeter CEF
let _ot_jumphost_ips = dynamic(["10.50.10.21","10.50.10.22"]);
let endpoint_view = ImNetworkSession
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where NetworkProtocol =~ "TCP"
    | where DstPortNumber == 20256
    | where SrcIpAddr !in (_ot_jumphost_ips)
    | project TimeGenerated, Source="ASIM_NetworkSession", DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
              SrcIpAddr, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber, NetworkProtocol,
              ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine, DvcAction;
let perimeter_view = CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where DestinationPort == 20256
    | where Protocol has "tcp"
    | where SourceIP !in (_ot_jumphost_ips)
    | project TimeGenerated, Source="PerimeterFW", DvcHostname=DeviceName, ActorUsername=SourceUserName,
              SrcIpAddr=SourceIP, DstIpAddr=DestinationIP, DstPortNumber=DestinationPort,
              NetworkProtocol=Protocol, ActingProcessName="", ActingProcessCommandLine="",
              DvcAction=DeviceAction;
union endpoint_view, perimeter_view
| extend SrcZone = iff(ipv4_is_private(SrcIpAddr),"internal","external"),
         DstZone = iff(ipv4_is_private(DstIpAddr),"internal","external")
| extend Scenario = case(SrcZone=="internal" and DstZone=="external", "endpoint_pivot_to_internet_PLC",
                          SrcZone=="external" and DstZone=="internal", "inbound_PLC_targeting",
                          SrcZone=="internal" and DstZone=="internal", "internal_PLC_sweep",
                          "other")
| summarize Hits = count(), DistinctPLCs = dcount(DstIpAddr), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            SamplePLCs = make_set(DstIpAddr, 25), Tools = make_set(ActingProcessName, 10)
          by DvcHostname, SrcIpAddr, ActorUsername, Scenario
| where DistinctPLCs >= 1
| order by DistinctPLCs desc, Hits desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Unitronics PCOM (TCP/20256) Connection — Suspected Cyber Av3ngers Targeting
id: 9d3f2c11-78a3-4a8e-9c2c-cyberav3ngersplc
status: experimental
description: Detects TCP/20256 (Unitronics PCOM) network connections from Windows endpoints. Cyber Av3ngers (IRGC-CEC) used this protocol/port to compromise and deface internet-exposed Unitronics Vision-series PLCs in late-2023 (e.g. Aliquippa water authority).
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-335a
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/alerts/2023/12/01/exploitation-unitronics-plcs-used-water-and-wastewater-systems
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    DestinationPort: 20256
    Protocol: tcp
    Initiated: 'true'
  filter_engineering:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\VisiLogic.exe'
      - '\UniLogic.exe'
  condition: selection and not filter_engineering
fields:
  - Image
  - SourceIp
  - DestinationIp
  - User
falsepositives:
  - Authorised OT engineering workstations running Unitronics VisiLogic/UniLogic — should be allowlisted by host.
level: high
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.t1133
  - ics.t0855
ucs.rationale: TCP/20256 PCOM is the unambiguous on-the-wire fingerprint of Cyber Av3ngers' Unitronics campaigns documented by CISA/FBI/NSA (AA23-335A). The port has no legitimate use outside Unitronics-aware engineering hosts, so any IT-side endpoint speaking 20256 is either a misplaced engineer or, more likely, an attacker pivoting toward OT — exactly the actor-specific behaviour. Generic ICS detections (Modbu

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `Protocol` is not a column of CommonSecurityLog, ImNetworkSession; it does exist on DeviceNetworkEvents, DeviceLogonEvents, IdentityLogonEvents, IdentityQueryEvents, IdentityDirectoryEvents, SecurityEvent.

`DeviceName` is not a column of CommonSecurityLog, ImNetworkSession; it does exist on DeviceProcessEvents, DeviceNetworkEvents, DeviceFileEvents, DeviceRegistryEvents, DeviceLogonEvents, DeviceImageLoadEvents, DeviceEvents, DeviceInfo, DeviceNetworkInfo, IdentityLogonEvents, IdentityQueryEvents, IdentityDirectoryEvents, DeviceTvmSoftwareInventory, DeviceTvmSoftwareVulnerabilities, AlertEvidence, AADSignInEventsBeta, ASCDeviceEvents.

_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Cyber Av3ngers IT-to-OT pivot: SMB admin-share wiper stage + remote service execution
ucs.description: Hunts the actor's enterprise-side kill chain that precedes their PLC defacements: phishing/T1190 → credential theft (T1003/T1555.003) → SMB admin-share write of a payload to a remote host (T1021.002) → SYSTEM-context execution of that payload via services.exe (T1569.002), often a wiper or PLC-staging tool (T1486). Catches the write-and-execute pair that Cyber Av3ngers and other IRGC-aligned crews (linked to IOCONTROL / similar wipers) use to fan out before reaching the OT segment.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as fileWriteTime, values(Filesystem.file_name) as wiper_file, values(Filesystem.file_path) as wiper_path, values(Filesystem.file_hash) as wiper_hash, values(Filesystem.process_name) as writing_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.action=created (Filesystem.file_path="*\\Windows\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\PerfLogs\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*") (Filesystem.file_name="*.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.dll" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.bat" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.ps1") Filesystem.process_name="System" by Filesystem.dest 
| `drop_dm_object_name("Filesystem")` 
| join type=inner dest [ 
    | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as svcStartTime, values(Processes.process) as svc_cmdline, values(Processes.process_name) as svc_child, values(Processes.process_path) as svc_child_path, values(Processes.user) as svc_user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name=services.exe (Processes.user="*SYSTEM*" OR Processes.user="NT AUTHORITY\\SYSTEM") (Processes.process_path="*\\Windows\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\PerfLogs\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*") by Processes.dest 
    | `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")` 
] 
| eval delta_sec = svcStartTime - fileWriteTime 
| where delta_sec >= 0 AND delta_sec <= 600 
| where like(svc_child_path, wiper_path."%") OR match(svc_cmdline, wiper_file) 
| table fileWriteTime, svcStartTime, delta_sec, dest, wiper_file, wiper_path, wiper_hash, svc_child, svc_cmdline, svc_user 
| sort - svcStartTime
ucs.kql:
// Cyber Av3ngers — SMB admin-share write followed by services.exe spawn of the same binary (lateral wiper stage)
let RecentDays = 14d;
let StagingPaths = dynamic([@"\Windows\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\Users\Public\"]);
let RemoteSmbWrites =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(RecentDays)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "System"                       // SMB writes show up as parent=System
    | where FileName endswith ".exe" or FileName endswith ".dll" or FileName endswith ".bat" or FileName endswith ".ps1"
    | where FolderPath has_any (StagingPaths)
    | where isnotempty(RequestSourceIP) or RequestProtocol has "SMB"     // remote-origin write
    | project WriteTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              StagedFile = FileName, StagedFolder = FolderPath,
              StagedSHA256 = SHA256, RemoteWriter = RequestSourceIP,
              RemoteWriterAcct = RequestAccountName;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(RecentDays)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "services.exe"
| where AccountName =~ "system"
| where FolderPath has_any (StagingPaths)
| join kind=inner RemoteSmbWrites on $left.DeviceId == $right.DeviceId,
                                      $left.FolderPath == $right.StagedFolder,
                                      $left.FileName == $right.StagedFile
| where Timestamp between (WriteTime .. WriteTime + 10m)
| extend DeltaSec = datetime_diff('second', Timestamp, WriteTime)
| project WriteTime, ExecTime = Timestamp, DeltaSec,
          DeviceName, RemoteWriter, RemoteWriterAcct,
          StagedFile, StagedFolder, StagedSHA256,
          ServiceCmd = ProcessCommandLine, ServiceFolder = FolderPath
| order by ExecTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Cyber Av3ngers — same detection on Sentinel via ASIM ImFileEvent + SecurityEvent 4688/7045
let RecentDays = 14d;
let StagingPaths = dynamic([@"\Windows\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\Users\Public\"]);
let RemoteSmbWrites =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentDays)
    | where EventType == "FileCreated"
    | where ActingProcessName has_any ("System","\\System")
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".exe" or TargetFileName endswith ".dll" or TargetFileName endswith ".bat" or TargetFileName endswith ".ps1"
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (StagingPaths)
    | project WriteTime = TimeGenerated, Computer = DvcHostname,
              StagedFile = TargetFileName, StagedFolder = TargetFilePath, StagedSHA256 = TargetFileSHA256;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where ParentProcessName endswith "\\services.exe"
| where SubjectUserSid == "S-1-5-18" or Account endswith "\\SYSTEM"
| where NewProcessName has_any (StagingPaths)
| extend Computer = tostring(Computer)
| join kind=inner RemoteSmbWrites on Computer
| where TimeGenerated between (WriteTime .. WriteTime + 10m)
| where NewProcessName has StagedFile
| extend DeltaSec = datetime_diff('second', TimeGenerated, WriteTime)
| project WriteTime, ExecTime = TimeGenerated, DeltaSec, Computer,
          StagedFile, StagedFolder, StagedSHA256,
          NewProcessName, CommandLine
| order by ExecTime desc
ucs.rationale: Cyber Av3ngers / IRGC-CEC operations against Western water-utility and manufacturing networks have repeatedly chained corporate-IT compromise (T1566/T1190 → T1003 credential theft) into SMB admin-share lateral movement (T1021.002) and service-driven execution (T1569.002) of wiper/staging payloads (T1486) before pivoting to the OT segment. The detection is anchored on the temporal pair: a SMB-origi
